hyperedges.label: Data-driven Rendering Pipeline (data/* + render.js -> index.html sections)
Bilingual ES/EN System (i18n engine + {es,en} data + lang toggle on both pages)

nodes.label: Bilingual Content Model ({es, en} objects)
nodes.rationale: All user-facing text is stored as paired {es, en} objects so the entire site can switch language at runtime without duplicating pages; content order in data files equals render order on the page.

nodes.label: Content/Code Separation Principle
nodes.rationale: All portfolio information lives in the data/ folder so the owner never needs to touch HTML, CSS, or JS to update content; after editing, a commit+push is enough because GitHub Pages redeploys automatically.

nodes.label: JSON-LD Person Structured Data
nodes.rationale: Schema.org Person markup embedded for SEO, linking the site identity to GitHub and LinkedIn profiles.
